project.name: ShipVitals
project.audience: AI-assisted builders, freelancers, and small agencies
project.promise: Audit AI-assisted projects as an evidence-first release gate with deterministic checks, scoring caps, real benchmark evidence, and clear READY/ALMOST READY/NOT READY/DEMO ONLY verdicts.
critical_flows: skill instructions load with evidence-first workflow
CLI audit command writes machine-readable evidence
packed npm CLI audits a clean Node project without Python
GitHub Pages site passes metadata and internal-link validation
real-world benchmark runs against cloned open-source repositories
case studies include real reports instead of placeholders
